  "evidence_standard_met": false,
  "evidence_standard_met_reason": "Images show two different car models; img_2 shows an undamaged car, while img_1 shows severe damage on a different car's front bumper. It's unclear which car is the subject of the claim, violating REQ_CAR_IDENTITY_OR_SIDE and REQ_REVIEW_TRUST.",

    "claim_mismatch",
    "wrong_object",
    "user_history_risk"

  "claim_status": "not_enough_information",
  "claim_status_justification": "Image img_1 shows severe damage (dent, deep scrape, missing material, dislodged headlight) on a front bumper, which is much more extensive than a 'scratch' as claimed. Image img_2 shows a completely different, undamaged car. This discrepancy in vehicle identity makes it impossible to confirm the claim for 'my car'.",
